special_mechanics.name: Magno-Boots Wall Running
special_mechanics.description: James Pond can run up walls and traverse ceilings. Once on a ceiling, Pond only falls if he jumps off. Some levels require upside-down navigation.

special_mechanics.name: Spring Shoes
special_mechanics.description: Gadget that allows repeated bouncing to achieve incrementally higher heights.

special_mechanics.name: Jetpack
special_mechanics.description: Device with rocket thruster that propels Pond upward. Fuel cans refill reserve. Equipped with yogurt cannon.

special_mechanics.name: Finnius Frog Character
special_mechanics.description: Alternate playable character who can bounce repeatedly on belly to jump increasingly high in air. Cannot use gadgets except chattering teeth.

special_mechanics.name: Television Ghost Bouncing
special_mechanics.description: Broken television releases ghost attempting to return to TV set. Player can bounce repeatedly on ghost while holding TV.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative) - No precise physics values documented. Source material provides gameplay descriptions and mechanical descriptions but no quantitative movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details. Descriptions suggest responsive control and relatively tight platforming mechanics based on review terminology.
sources_used: Wikipedia - James Pond 3: Operation Starfish article
